name: Ummey Hani Barsha
title: Ph.D. Candidate, Consumer and Design Sciences · Auburn University
bio: PhD candidate at Auburn University exploring the intersection of sustainable fashion design, consumer behavior, and textile innovation. Educator, researcher, and creative practitioner with roots in Dhaka, Bangladesh.

professional_affiliations.organization: American Association of Family and Consumer Sciences (AAFCS)

outreach.organization: Auburn University College of Human Sciences
outreach.description: Mentored undergraduate students on ITAA design exhibition submissions including abstract writing, design development, and presentation.

awards.name: College of Human Sciences Graduate Research Fellowship
